requirement_topic.en: EMA Grid-Connection Standards — Anti-Islanding (IEC 62116), SP PowerGrid Requirements, and 50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V Settings
requirement_topic.zh: EMA并网标准——防孤岛（IEC 62116）、SP PowerGrid要求及50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V参数
requirement_topic.zht: EMA併網標準——防孤島（IEC 62116）、SP PowerGrid要求及50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V參數

summary.en: Singapore's Energy Market Authority (EMA) governs the connection of solar PV systems to the grid through the EMA Handbook for Solar PV Systems (current edition), which sets out the technical and administrative requirements for grid-connected PV installations. Key requirements include: (1) IEC 62116 anti-islanding test — inverters must detect loss of mains and disconnect within 2 seconds maximum; (2) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety compliance; (3) IEC 62920 EMC compliance; (4) SP PowerGrid (SP Group) interconnection agreement for systems connected to the distribution network; (5) installation by a Licensed Electrical Worker (LEW) endorsed for the relevant scope. Singapore's grid operates at 50 Hz, single-phase 230 V, three-phase 400 V. Inverter firmware and protection relay settings must be validated for Singapore's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid — not the 220/380 V settings used in China under GB/T 156. Project-specific technical requirements must be confirmed with SP PowerGrid before grid connection.
summary.zh: 新加坡能源市场管理局（EMA）通过《太阳能光伏系统手册》（现行版）管理太阳能光伏系统并网事宜，规定了并网光伏装置的技术和行政要求。主要要求包括：（1）IEC 62116防孤岛测试——逆变器须在最长2秒内检测电网失电并断开；（2）IEC 62109-1/-2安全合规；（3）IEC 62920 EMC合规；（4）接入配电网的系统须与SP PowerGrid（SP集团）签订互联协议；（5）由具备相关资质范围的持牌电工（LEW）安装。新加坡电网运行参数为50 Hz、单相230 V、三相400 V。逆变器固件和保护继电器整定须针对新加坡230/400 V、50 Hz电网进行验证，而非中国依据GB/T 156使用的220/380 V参数。项目特定技术要求须在并网前向SP PowerGrid确认。
summary.zht: 新加坡能源市場管理局（EMA）透過《太陽能光伏系統手冊》（現行版）管理太陽能光伏系統併網事宜，規定了併網光伏裝置的技術和行政要求。主要要求包括：（1）IEC 62116防孤島測試——逆變器須在最長2秒內偵測電網失電並斷開；（2）IEC 62109-1/-2安全合規；（3）IEC 62920 EMC合規；（4）接入配電網的系統須與SP PowerGrid（SP集團）簽訂互聯協議；（5）由具備相關資質範圍的持牌電工（LEW）安裝。新加坡電網運行參數為50 Hz、單相230 V、三相400 V。逆變器韌體和保護繼電器整定須針對新加坡230/400 V、50 Hz電網進行驗證，而非中國依據GB/T 156使用的220/380 V參數。項目特定技術要求須在併網前向SP PowerGrid確認。

standards_or_laws: EMA Handbook for Solar PV Systems — Singapore grid-connection technical and administrative requirements (published by Energy Market Authority, ema.gov.sg)
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
SP PowerGrid interconnection conditions — distribution network connection requirements (spgroup.com.sg)

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System, applicable to utility-scale PV via 10 kV and above), NB/T 32004 (inverter technical specifications), GB/T 37408-2021 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), and domestic anti-islanding test results. These Chinese grid-connection documents are based on Chinese grid conditions and are not accepted as Singapore EMA or SP PowerGrid grid-connection evidence. The key parameter difference is voltage: China's grid standard is 220/380 V at 50 Hz under GB/T 156, whereas Singapore operates at 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Firmware protection thresholds validated for Chinese grid conditions must be re-parameterised and documented for Singapore grid conditions.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定，适用于通过10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏电站）、NB/T 32004（逆变器技术规范）、GB/T 37408-2021（光伏并网逆变器技术要求）及国内防孤岛测试结果。上述中国并网文件基于中国电网条件，不被新加坡EMA或SP PowerGrid接受为并网证据。主要参数差异在于电压：中国电网标准依据GB/T 156为220/380 V 50 Hz，而新加坡电网为230/400 V 50 Hz。针对中国电网条件验证的固件保护阈值须重新针对新加坡电网条件设置参数并记录。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定，適用於通過10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏電站）、NB/T 32004（逆變器技術規範）、GB/T 37408-2021（光伏並網逆變器技術要求）及國內防孤島測試結果。上述中國併網文件基於中國電網條件，不被新加坡EMA或SP PowerGrid接受為併網證據。主要參數差異在於電壓：中國電網標準依據GB/T 156為220/380 V 50 Hz，而新加坡電網為230/400 V 50 Hz。針對中國電網條件驗證的韌體保護閾值須重新針對新加坡電網條件設置參數並記錄。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents do not satisfy Singapore EMA or SP PowerGrid requirements. Exporters must prepare: (a) IEC 62116 anti-islanding test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory; (b) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence; (c) IEC 62920 EMC compliance evidence; (d) firmware protection thresholds and reconnection delays validated for Singapore's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid — not the 220/380 V Chinese grid parameters. Where inverter firmware settings differ from the factory default for China, re-parameterisation should be documented and, if the change is material, re-tested under the applicable IEC standard. Installation must be performed by a LEW licensed in Singapore. Project-specific SP PowerGrid interconnection requirements must be confirmed directly with SP PowerGrid before equipment finalisation.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T并网文件不满足新加坡EMA或SP PowerGrid要求。出口商须准备：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62116防孤岛测试报告；（b）IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据；（c）IEC 62920 EMC合规证据；（d）针对新加坡230/400 V、50 Hz电网（而非中国220/380 V电网参数）验证的固件保护阈值和重连延迟。若逆变器固件设置与中国出厂默认设置不同，须记录重新参数化过程，如变更重要，应依据适用IEC标准重新测试。安装须由新加坡持牌电工（LEW）执行。项目特定SP PowerGrid互联要求须在设备最终确定前直接向SP PowerGrid确认。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T併網文件不滿足新加坡EMA或SP PowerGrid要求。出口商須準備：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62116防孤島測試報告；（b）IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據；（c）IEC 62920 EMC合規證據；（d）針對新加坡230/400 V、50 Hz電網（而非中國220/380 V電網參數）驗證的韌體保護閾值和重連延遲。若逆變器韌體設置與中國出廠預設設置不同，須記錄重新參數化過程，如變更重要，應依據適用IEC標準重新測試。安裝須由新加坡持牌電工（LEW）執行。項目特定SP PowerGrid互聯要求須在設備最終確定前直接向SP PowerGrid確認。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid connection under EMA requirements and SP PowerGrid interconnection conditions; IEC 62116 anti-islanding and LEW installation are non-negotiable requirements under Singapore law
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China's grid operator requirements but does not transfer to Singapore EMA or SP PowerGrid grid-connection acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Singapore EMA grid-connection requirements reference IEC 62116, IEC 62109-1/-2, and IEC 62920 — none of which is covered by Chinese GB/T grid certificates. Re-parameterise inverter firmware for Singapore's 230/400 V at 50 Hz grid before testing and document the configuration. Verify the current edition of the EMA Handbook for Solar PV Systems and any SP PowerGrid project-specific conditions directly with EMA (ema.gov.sg) and SP PowerGrid (spgroup.com.sg) before finalising the equipment compliance package.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 新加坡EMA并网要求引用IEC 62116、IEC 62109-1/-2和IEC 62920——上述均未被中国GB/T并网证书覆盖。测试前须将逆变器固件重新参数化为新加坡230/400 V 50 Hz电网参数，并记录配置。在最终确定设备合规包前，请直接向EMA（ema.gov.sg）和SP PowerGrid（spgroup.com.sg）核实《太阳能光伏系统手册》的现行版本及任何SP PowerGrid项目特定条件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 新加坡EMA併網要求引用IEC 62116、IEC 62109-1/-2和IEC 62920——上述均未被中國GB/T併網證書覆蓋。測試前須將逆變器韌體重新參數化為新加坡230/400 V 50 Hz電網參數，並記錄配置。在最終確定設備合規包前，請直接向EMA（ema.gov.sg）和SP PowerGrid（spgroup.com.sg）核實《太陽能光伏系統手冊》的現行版本及任何SP PowerGrid項目特定條件。

requirement_topic.en: SP PowerGrid Distributed Solar Connection — Net Metering, LEW Requirements, and Project Approval Process
requirement_topic.zh: SP PowerGrid分布式太阳能接入——净电量计量、持牌电工要求及项目审批流程
requirement_topic.zht: SP PowerGrid分散式太陽能接入——淨電量計量、持牌電工要求及項目審批流程

summary.en: Distributed solar PV systems in Singapore connecting to the SP PowerGrid (SP Group) low-voltage or high-voltage distribution network must follow the SP PowerGrid connection process as set out in EMA's regulatory framework. Key requirements include: (a) application to SP PowerGrid for grid connection prior to installation; (b) technical review and approval of inverter specifications by SP PowerGrid; (c) installation by a Licensed Electrical Worker (LEW) or Licensed Electrical Engineer (LEE) endorsed for the relevant voltage class; (d) a final Turn-On inspection and SP PowerGrid commissioning before energisation; (e) a net-metering or enhanced feed-in tariff arrangement (where applicable under EMA's Enhanced Central Intermediary Scheme or direct market participation for larger systems). Chinese PV inverters must comply with EMA and SP PowerGrid technical requirements as a condition of project approval and grid connection.
summary.zh: 新加坡接入SP PowerGrid（SP集团）低压或高压配电网的分布式太阳能光伏系统须按照EMA监管框架规定的SP PowerGrid接入流程操作。主要要求包括：（a）安装前向SP PowerGrid申请并网；（b）SP PowerGrid对逆变器规格进行技术审查和审批；（c）由具备相关电压等级资质的持牌电工（LEW）或持牌电气工程师（LEE）安装；（d）通电前完成最终通电检查及SP PowerGrid调试；（e）净电量计量或增强上网电价安排（如适用于EMA增强中央中介方案或大型系统直接市场参与）。中国光伏逆变器须符合EMA和SP PowerGrid技术要求，作为项目审批和并网的条件。
summary.zht: 新加坡接入SP PowerGrid（SP集團）低壓或高壓配電網的分散式太陽能光伏系統須按照EMA監管框架規定的SP PowerGrid接入流程操作。主要要求包括：（a）安裝前向SP PowerGrid申請併網；（b）SP PowerGrid對逆變器規格進行技術審查和審批；（c）由具備相關電壓等級資質的持牌電工（LEW）或持牌電氣工程師（LEE）安裝；（d）通電前完成最終通電檢查及SP PowerGrid調試；（e）淨電量計量或增強上網電價安排（如適用於EMA增強中央中介方案或大型系統直接市場參與）。中國光伏逆變器須符合EMA和SP PowerGrid技術要求，作為項目審批和併網的條件。

standards_or_laws: EMA Handbook for Solar PV Systems — Singapore distributed solar grid-connection rules and application process (ema.gov.sg)
SP PowerGrid connection application process and technical requirements (spgroup.com.sg)
Electricity Act (Singapore) — licensing and LEW/LEE requirements for electrical installation work

summary.en: China does not have a direct equivalent programme. Distributed solar connection in China is governed by National Energy Administration (NEA) distributed PV policies and grid operator (State Grid, Southern Power Grid) connection rules, which reference China's domestic standards (NB/T 32004, GB/T 37408-2021, GB/T 19964-2024). These Chinese distributed connection rules are not applicable in Singapore and do not give any presumption of compliance with SP PowerGrid or EMA equipment requirements. There is no LEW/LEE equivalent mandatory installation certification in China for residential or commercial PV; China's domestic qualification system differs materially from Singapore's statutory LEW framework.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接对应的计划。中国分布式太阳能并网受国家能源局（NEA）分布式光伏政策及电网运营商（国家电网、南方电网）接入规则管理，引用中国国内标准（NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408-2021、GB/T 19964-2024）。上述中国分布式并网规则不适用于新加坡，不给予SP PowerGrid或EMA设备要求的任何合规推定。中国住宅或商业光伏安装无直接等效的强制性LEW/LEE安装认证；中国国内资质体系与新加坡法定持牌电工框架存在实质差异。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接對應的計畫。中國分散式太陽能併網受國家能源局（NEA）分散式光伏政策及電網運營商（國家電網、南方電網）接入規則管理，引用中國國內標準（NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408-2021、GB/T 19964-2024）。上述中國分散式併網規則不適用於新加坡，不給予SP PowerGrid或EMA設備要求的任何合規推定。中國住宅或商業光伏安裝無直接等效的強制性LEW/LEE安裝認證；中國國內資質體系與新加坡法定持牌電工框架存在實質差異。

standards_or_laws: NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese inverters for Singapore distributed solar projects must pass SP PowerGrid technical review and be installed by a LEW/LEE licensed in Singapore. Chinese domestic distributed solar connection approvals do not transfer to Singapore SP PowerGrid requirements. Confirm inverter model eligibility, IEC safety and grid-connection test evidence, and LEW/LEE availability with the project contractor before committing product to Singapore distributed solar projects. Verify current SP PowerGrid application procedures and any updated technical requirements directly at spgroup.com.sg.
gap.zh: 差距：用于新加坡分布式太阳能项目的中国逆变器须通过SP PowerGrid技术审查，并由新加坡持牌电工（LEW/LEE）安装。中国国内分布式太阳能并网审批不能转移至新加坡SP PowerGrid要求。在将产品用于新加坡分布式太阳能项目前，请与项目承包商确认逆变器型号资格、IEC安全和并网测试证据及LEW/LEE资源情况。请直接在spgroup.com.sg核实SP PowerGrid当前申请程序和最新技术要求。
gap.zht: 差距：用於新加坡分散式太陽能項目的中國逆變器須通過SP PowerGrid技術審查，並由新加坡持牌電工（LEW/LEE）安裝。中國國內分散式太陽能併網審批不能轉移至新加坡SP PowerGrid要求。在將產品用於新加坡分散式太陽能項目前，請與項目承包商確認逆變器型號資格、IEC安全和併網測試證據及LEW/LEE資源情況。請直接在spgroup.com.sg核實SP PowerGrid當前申請程序和最新技術要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for all distributed solar grid-connection projects in Singapore; SP PowerGrid technical review and LEW/LEE installation are statutory requirements under Singapore's Electricity Act
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese distributed solar connection approvals are granted under China NEA policy and grid operator rules — not transferable to Singapore

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SP PowerGrid solar connection is a separate project approval gate from any Chinese domestic distributed solar approval. Confirm inverter model eligibility and IEC compliance evidence with the LEW/LEE contractor and SP PowerGrid project review team before project submission. Verify current application requirements and equipment eligibility criteria directly at spgroup.com.sg and ema.gov.sg.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] SP PowerGrid太阳能接入是独立于任何中国国内分布式太阳能审批的项目审批门槛。在项目提交前，请与持牌电工（LEW/LEE）承包商及SP PowerGrid项目审查团队确认逆变器型号资格和IEC合规证据。请直接在spgroup.com.sg和ema.gov.sg核实当前申请要求和设备资格标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] SP PowerGrid太陽能接入是獨立於任何中國國內分散式太陽能審批的項目審批門檻。在項目提交前，請與持牌電工（LEW/LEE）承包商及SP PowerGrid項目審查團隊確認逆變器型號資格和IEC合規證據。請直接在spgroup.com.sg和ema.gov.sg核實當前申請要求和設備資格標準。
